titleStmt.title: SII 24.235: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 235. (A.R. No. 98 of 1937-38.) WEST WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers a sale of garden-land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by a number of persons. The record belongs to the 2+1st year of Māṟavarmaṉ Tribhuvanachakravartin Kulaśēkhara and is dated in Mēsha, ba. 7, Thursday, Sadayam. The details of date correspond to A.D. 1316 April 15, Thursday. Since the combination of Sadaiyam with the other details given is impossible, it may be considered to be a mistake for Uttirāḍam or Śravaṇam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 2vatu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa catayattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil kuṭavāyil tiruṉaṟaiyūr dāsaṉum Iṭavai tirumaṅkai ṉampiyum śrīvaikunta tāsaṉum dāsanampimāril kulacekaradāsaṉum paccaivāraṇadāsaṉ ciṅkarum Aruḷāḷaṉum Ivvaṉaivom tirunantavaṉam nilavilai pramāṇam koyilakaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta tiru
nantavaṉamāṉatu . tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu vaṭavoḻukil pāṭakattāḻvār paṟṟāy ṉāṅkaḷ śrīsenāpatip peruvilaiyākak koṇṭuṭaiyomāy Eṅkaḷutāṉa tirunanta vaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpārkkellai tirunaṟaiyūrdāsan tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tirunantavaṉameṭṭukku vaṭakku mipārkkellai tirunaṟai yūrdāsan tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kāveri niroṭukālukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvuppaṭṭa viḷainilamum Akavāyāṟṟup paṭukaiyum Uṭpaṭa Eṅkaḷutāṉa taṭi palaviṉāl tirunantavaṉam kiḻ mel kol 6 10 Ittirunantavaṉam kol Aṟupatum Iṟṟaināḷāl ṉāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa
Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷ Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkukiṉṟa paṇam kol 1 kku paṇam Irupattoṉṟāka 1000 2 100 6 10 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatum Āvaṇak kaḷiriye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaic celavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaikunta dāsanum tirunaṟaiyūr dāsanum tirumaṅkainampiyum kulaśekharadāsaṉum paccai vāraṇa daāsaṉ ciṅkarum Aruḷāḷarum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol Aṟupatilum mel ṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻ ṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa sama
staprāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol Aṟupatukkum Ippaṇam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatume vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom koyilakaram śrīkodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku tiru naṟaiyūr dāsaṉum
Aruḷāḷarum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvaikunta dāsan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumaṅkainampi Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Ittirunantavaṉa nilavilai pramāṇam Eḻutiṉamaikku Ivai Iṭavai Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyanāyaṉār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
